content.question: What is the actual travel-time and transport-cost burden for rural applicants to six- and eight-year tracks compared to both generic secondary schools and urban peers?
content.reduction_path: Conduct a travel-distance audit using geographic information systems (GIS) to map six- and eight-year track locations and calculate commute times and costs from rural settlement clusters; supplement with qualitative interviews from rural families regarding transport barriers and dormitory uptake.
